base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of file_select_screen_bg — a ui from 1986 legend of zelda. File-select screen background — 3 save-slot entries 'NAME / LIFE' readouts + 'REGISTER YOUR NAME' + 'ELIMINATION MODE' option rows. Pale-green border on black. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: File-select screen background — 3 save-slot entries 'NAME / LIFE' readouts + 'REGISTER YOUR NAME' + 'ELIMINATION MODE' option rows. Pale-green border on black
